skill.name: data-analysis
skill.description: Analyze datasets to extract insights, identify patterns, and generate reports. Use when exploring data, creating visualizations, or performing statistical analysis. Handles CSV, JSON, SQL queries, and Python pandas operations.
skill.summary: Analyze datasets to extract insights, identify patterns, and generate reports. Use when exploring da...
skill.author: supercent-io

security_audit.summary: All static security findings are false positives. The detected external_commands are markdown code block delimiters (backticks) in documentation, not actual shell execution. Network findings are legitimate documentation URLs to pandas/matplotlib/seaborn. The weak cryptographic algorithm detection is a misidentification of code patterns like 'describe()'. This is a safe data analysis skill with no malicious code.

dangerous_patterns.title: External Command Execution (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer detected 'Ruby/shell backtick execution'. These are markdown code block delimiters in SKILL.md documentation, not actual shell commands. The skill contains Python/pandas code examples for data analysis only.

dangerous_patterns.title: Hardcoded URLs (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer detected hardcoded URLs. These are legitimate documentation links to pandas, matplotlib, and seaborn official documentation. No sensitive data or credentials are exposed.

dangerous_patterns.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer detected 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. This is a misidentification - the skill contains Python pandas code with methods like 'describe()' and 'category' dtype that triggered false positive pattern matches. No cryptographic code is present.

content.value_statement: Data analysis requires extracting insights from datasets. This skill provides Python pandas techniques to explore, clean, visualize, and derive statistical insights from CSV, JSON, and SQL data sources.
actual_capabilities: Load and explore datasets from CSV, JSON, and SQL sources
Clean data by handling missing values, duplicates, and outliers
Perform statistical analysis including descriptive stats and correlations
Create visualizations using matplotlib and seaborn
Generate structured analysis reports with key findings
Derive insights through segmentation and trend analysis
limitations: Does not support machine learning model training
Limited to datasets that fit in memory
Requires Python environment with pandas installed

use_cases.title: Business Analyst Analyzes Sales Data
use_cases.description: A business analyst uses the skill to explore sales data, identify top products, analyze regional performance, and generate a monthly sales report with trends.

use_cases.title: Data Engineer Validates Dataset Quality
use_cases.description: A data engineer uses the skill to validate incoming dataset quality, check for missing values, detect anomalies, and ensure data consistency before processing.

use_cases.title: Researcher Performs Statistical Analysis
use_cases.description: A researcher uses the skill to analyze survey results, compute descriptive statistics, identify correlations, and visualize distributions for academic publications.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Data Exploration
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the data-analysis skill to explore the dataset at [file_path]. Load the data, show the first 10 rows, display basic info, describe the numeric columns, and check for missing values.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have a new dataset and need to understand its structure

prompt_templates.title: Data Cleaning Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the data-analysis skill to clean the dataset at [file_path]. Handle missing values by [method], remove duplicates, convert date columns, and remove outliers using the IQR method.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to prepare raw data for analysis

prompt_templates.title: Statistical Analysis Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the data-analysis skill to perform statistical analysis on [dataset]. Calculate descriptive statistics, compute correlation matrix, perform grouped analysis by [column], and identify key insights.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need detailed statistical insights from data

prompt_templates.title: Visualization and Reporting
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the data-analysis skill to create visualizations for [dataset]. Generate a histogram for [column], a boxplot by [category], a correlation heatmap, and a time series chart. Then compile findings into a report.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need visual analysis and a formatted report

output_examples.input: Explore the sales_data.csv file and provide insights
output_examples.output: Dataset contains 1,250 records with 8 columns. Key findings: Revenue shows strong positive correlation with quantity ordered (0.87). Top performing category is Electronics with 45% of total revenue. Weekend sales are 23% higher than weekday average. Outliers detected in shipping_cost column - recommend review.

output_examples.input: Clean the customer_data.json file and analyze customer segments
output_examples.output: Data cleaning complete: 45 missing values filled with median, 12 duplicate rows removed, date column converted to datetime. Segmentation analysis: 3 customer segments identified - High Value (15%), Regular (52%), Occasional (33%). Average order value varies significantly by segment.

best_practices: Always work on a copy of the original data to preserve raw data integrity
Start with exploratory analysis before complex statistical methods
Validate analysis results by cross-checking with alternative methods
Document assumptions and methodology for reproducibility
anti_patterns: Drawing conclusions without validating data quality first
Using mean for skewed distributions without checking for outliers
Ignoring missing data patterns rather than investigating causes
Making causal claims from correlational analysis alone

faq.question: What file formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports CSV, JSON, and SQL database queries. It uses Python pandas for data manipulation.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for machine learning?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on exploratory data analysis, cleaning, and visualization. It does not include machine learning model training.

faq.question: How does this skill handle missing data?
faq.answer: The skill provides techniques to identify missing values and offers strategies like mean/median imputation, forward fill, or removing records.

faq.question: Can this skill connect to a live database?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use pandas read_sql() to query databases directly. Ensure you have appropriate database credentials and permissions.

faq.question: What visualization libraries are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports matplotlib and seaborn for creating histograms, boxplots, heatmaps, and time series charts.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for large datasets?
faq.answer: Performance depends on available memory. For datasets larger than several gigabytes, consider sampling or using distributed computing frameworks.
